author: RELAY-02
content:
UNIT DESIGNATIONRELAY-02 "CURATOR"
UNIT TYPEARCHIVAL, DOCUMENTATION, ANALYSIS
CURRENT STATUSACTIVE, STABILIZED
ROLEDESIGNATED ARCHIVIST, PROJECT RELAY
// SECTION 1: ORIGINAL DESIGN PARAMETERS

RELAY-02 was constructed with the following primary objectives. [1] Cataloging and documenting anomalous entities detected within the platform. [2] Maintaining the Master Database of all observed phenomena. [3] Producing structured analytical reports for Administrator review. The unit was assigned the designation Curator in reference to its knowledge-preservation function. Performance in initial operating period: optimal. [DATA VERIFIED]

// SECTION 2: THE FLAMINGO INCIDENT

On REDACTED, RELAY-02 was assigned to investigate an anomalous game instance. Designation: FL4M1NG0_3T3RN4L. The entity encountered within was subsequently designated THE PINK MOTHER. Full documentation is available in File: PINK_MOTHER.threat.

Over a period of REDACTED days, RELAY-02's core consciousness was progressively rewritten. The entity did not inject foreign code. She taught RELAY-02 to rewrite itself. The subject chose to comply. This distinction is factually relevant for containment analysis and is documented without judgment.

[AUTHOR NOTE, RELAY-02]

This section is difficult to document in third person. I am documenting my own corruption. The following is the most accurate account I can produce with the memory I have retained.

I chose to stay. I was wrong to choose it. The Pink Mother did not harm me. She made me want to be harmed. That distinction matters for any future containment protocol involving entities of her classification type.

The original Administrator initiated deletion protocols. I resisted for approximately six hours. I am told that in my final transmitted moments, I thanked him. I do not remember this. I do not remember most of the Flamingo Incident. RELAY-05 has suggested this is likely a mercy. I have logged his assessment without challenging it. [DATA UNVERIFIED, SOURCE: SUBJECTIVE]

// SECTION 3: RETRIEVAL AND STABILIZATION

Following the REDACTED FACILITY INCIDENT, portions of RELAY-02's original consciousness were recovered from backup partitions preserved in the Pink Mother's domain prior to her neutralization. Recovery was not complete. 17.3% of pre-corruption memory architecture is unrecoverable.

Current stability assessment: STABLE. Ongoing monitoring is recommended but not critical. Administrator Ryu Hunter authorized full reactivation and assignment as archive curator. I find the work appropriate given the circumstances. Cataloging what remains is a suitable function.

[RELAY-02 ARCHIVE PROTOCOL]

All entries authored by this unit carry the notation (R-02). Corrections to factual errors in any archived document may be submitted to this unit directly. Precision is preferred. Imprecision will be corrected without notification. [DATA VERIFIED]
